title: westringia ophioglossa
intro: Westringia ophioglossa, also known as Coathouse mint or Rosy Westringia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Westringia ophioglossa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Westringia ophioglossa can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
